sourceRef: tip:How to name files so your audit self thanks you

slides.headline: Automate Certifications, Track Compliance
slides.body: Effortlessly manage VA certifications for student veterans.

slides.headline: Streamline Certifications
slides.body: Easily upload and manage certification documents.

slides.headline: Track Compliance
slides.body: Monitor and report on student veteran compliance.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Empower students with accessible resources and support.

slides.headline: Enhance Student Experience
slides.body: Boost student engagement and satisfaction with seamless tools.

slides.headline: Stay Compliant
slides.body: Ensure your institution complies with VA regulations.

outline.caption: Automate certifications, track compliance, and support student veterans with VASCO Assistant Pro. Effortlessly manage VA School Certifying Official duties.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is the first one, as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to grab attention.
